    A VIDEO MESSAGE FROM
    JENNIFER MASON
    FOUNDER | PRESIDENT | CEO

    READ HER STORY

    NEWS: "Mason Technologies to Break Ground on New
    $30 Million Corporate Headquarters in Hauppauge, NY"

    Mason Technologies will host a groundbreaking ceremony to celebrate the construction of its new corporate headquarters in the Long Island Innovation Park at Hauppauge. The state-of-the-art facility will support the company’s continued growth, housing Mason’s more than 230 full-time employees with plans to add 25 additional positions within two years of completion. The Innovation Park is the second largest industrial park in the United States second to Silicon Valley.

    Read More

    How Our Process Works

    1. Assess

    Our team of industry experts will perform site surveys and technology evaluations including analysis of environmental elements, to determine what the best action would be for your business.

    2. Design

    After evaluating the project, Mason engineers will put pen to paper or work with our network of Industry Leading consultants to produce the Audio Visual design that meets each and every requirement from technology to budget.

    3. Install

    Upon confirmation, Mason Technologies has a fully staffed Project Management team with almost 200 Certified CWA Technicians to immediately staff your projects.

    4. Manage

    As a Day 2 Service company, we show our strength again! Once the project is complete, Mason Technologies offers baseline service contracts included for 1 year as part of every installation as well as turnkey MSA's for all technologies.
